questions.text: The "FCC" (Order Confirmation File) will continue to be used in the new NEO process.
The "Platinum Flow" refers to affiliates that are connected to the APO system, where weekly requirements are calculated directly.
The NNR (Net Requirement File) is transmitted to S&OP on a monthly basis.
"RBS" stands for "Remain to be Sold" and is calculated as RBS = M Forecast - M Goods Issued for sales.
Under NEO, for ZCD1 flow products, affiliates will calculate their net requirements in SAP S/4 and send them to APO on a weekly bucket, reflecting replenishment phasing.
The "DRP Consistency Check" report is manually generated by the user each time they run MRP.
